site_rule: If a registered installer self-certifies, the homeowner should receive evidence/certificate. If not, route to building control.
Notifiable electrical work should be done by a registered electrician or notified to building control before work where required.

common_schemes: Gas Safe registration for gas safety; building regulations compliance certificate via installer route
site_rule: Do not offer gas-safety advice beyond routing to a competent registered installer and evidence retention.

plain: Oil, solid fuel and biomass appliances
site_rule: Route to competent installer and highlight flue/combustion/ventilation evidence.

plain: Heat pumps, solar and some renewable systems
site_rule: Separate planning/noise/structural checks may still apply.
Flag high-risk/scalding/pressure safety and require competent installer or building control route.
